body:
This pull request includes several minor updates to the GitHub Actions workflows and documentation, as well as the addition of a new bibliographic reference. The most significant changes are version bumps for GitHub Actions and the Codecov action, improvements to documentation clarity, and the inclusion of a new citation.

Closes: https://github.com/CliMA/CloudMicrophysics.jl/pull/655, https://github.com/CliMA/CloudMicrophysics.jl/pull/654, https://github.com/CliMA/CloudMicrophysics.jl/pull/653, https://github.com/CliMA/CloudMicrophysics.jl/pull/651

labels.description: Pull requests that update a dependency file
labels.name: Dependencies 🍱

title: update github actions and doc fixes
